confirm.deleteUser: Delete {{name}}? This will permanently remove their account and access.
confirm.deactivateUser: Deactivate {{name}}? They will no longer be able to sign in.
confirm.deleteRole: Delete {{name}}? Users assigned this role may lose access.
confirm.deletePermission: Delete {{name}}? This will remove the permission from all roles that use it.
confirm.deleteBranch: Delete {{name}}? Warehouses and assignments for this branch will be removed.
confirm.deactivateWarehouse: Deactivate {{name}}? It will be hidden from inventory and transfer pickers.
confirm.deleteCategory: Delete {{name}}? Products in this category will be uncategorized.
confirm.deleteBrand: Delete {{name}}? Products for this brand will be unbranded.
confirm.deleteCustomer: Delete {{name}}? Their loyalty history and wallet records will be removed.
confirm.deleteCustomerGroup: Delete {{name}}? Customers in this group will be unassigned.
confirm.deleteUnit: Delete {{name}}? Products using this unit must be updated first.
confirm.deleteProduct: Delete {{name}}? All variants and identifiers will be removed.

hrEmployees.shiftHint: Default Shift Preferences Only. Full Rosters Will Connect Here In A Later Module.
hrEmployees.holidayHint: Assign A Holiday Calendar For This Employee. Resolution Prefer Employee Over Branch And Entity.
hrEmployees.attendanceHint: Late Grace And Overtime Eligibility Are Stored On The Profile.
hrEmployees.orgAssignmentEffectiveFromHint: Leave Blank To Apply Org Changes Immediately. Future Dates Schedule The Change.
hrEmployees.terminationDateHint: Set Only Via The Terminate Action.
hrEmployees.terminateConfirmDescription: This Will Mark {{name}} As Terminated And Exclude Them From Future Payroll Runs. Choose The Termination Date Below.
hrEmployees.reactivateConfirmDescription: This Will Restore {{name}} To Active Status And Clear The Termination Date.

wizard.banksOptionalHint: Bank Accounts Are Optional On Create. You Can Add Or Edit Them Later.

hints.weekendDaysOverride: Independent from Rest Days above (which are for overtime rest-day detection). Falls back to the branch, then legal-entity, weekly off-days default when not overridden. Leave every day unchecked if this employee has no weekly day off (e.g. a departmental store role).

attachments.addMoreHint: Add Multiple Upload Groups With Different Document Types. Up To {{max}} Images Total.

fields.allowCashClaimHint: Employees May Redeem This Balance As A Payroll Payout (TOIL Only)

fields.negativeLeaveBalancePolicyHint: What Happens When A Request Would Exceed The Available Leave Balance.
fields.prorationOnJoinHint: Prorate Accrual When An Employee Joins Mid-Period
fields.excludePublicHolidaysHint: Do Not Count Public Holidays In Leave Day Totals
fields.excludeWeekendsHint: Do Not Count Weekend Days In Leave Day Totals

fields.encashmentAllowedHint: Employees May Convert Unused Leave Days Into A Payroll Payout

leavePolicies.eligibilityHint: Leave Any Filter Empty To Match Everyone On That Dimension — Matches Current Behavior Until Configured.

leaveRequests.reschedulePlaceholder: Optional — Why Are The Dates Changing…
leaveRequests.balanceWarningHint: This Request Would Exceed The Employee's Available Leave Balance.

infoPanel.title: Duration Types
infoPanel.fullDay: Full Day — the standard option, deducts a full day per date in the range.
infoPanel.halfDay: Half Day — a single date, always 0.5 days; pick a morning or afternoon session.
infoPanel.shortLeave: Short Leave — a single date with a start/end time, counted in hours converted to days.
infoPanel.outStation: Out Station — a full-day equivalent that only deducts from the balance if the resolved policy allows it.

leaveEncashments.indexDescription: Convert Unused Leave Balance Into A Payroll Payout.
leaveEncashments.createDescription: Request A Leave Encashment On Behalf Of An Employee.
leaveEncashments.searchPlaceholder: Search By Employee Name Or Code…

infoPanel.title: How This Works
infoPanel.step1: The requested days are held against the employee's leave balance so they can't be taken as leave and encashed at the same time.
infoPanel.step2: An approver reviews the request and approves or rejects it.
infoPanel.step3: Once approved, the payout is picked up automatically by the next payroll run.

leaveYearEndRuns.indexDescription: Audit Trail Of Carry-Forward, Expiry, And Automatic Encashment At Leave Year-End.

leaveEntitlements.indexDescription: View And Manually Adjust Employee Leave Balances.
leaveEntitlements.searchPlaceholder: Search By Employee Name Or Code…
leaveEntitlements.adjustHint: Adjustments are recorded in the audit log with the previous value, actor, and timestamp.
leaveEntitlements.grantHint: Manually grant a leave type to an employee, outside normal policy eligibility (e.g. a one-off compassionate leave grant). This bypasses eligibility rules and is flagged as a manual grant.

overtimePolicies.indexDescription: Configured Thresholds And Multipliers For Overtime Calculation.

fields.restDayAppliesHint: Use Rest Day Multiplier On Rest Days
fields.publicHolidayAppliesHint: Use Public Holiday Multiplier On Public Holidays
fields.toilExpiryMonthsHint: How Long Credited TOIL Hours Remain Claimable Before Expiring. Blank = Never Expires.

overtimeRecords.indexDescription: Review And Approve Calculated Overtime From Attendance.
overtimeRecords.searchPlaceholder: Search By Employee Name Or Code…

toilClaims.indexDescription: Convert Banked TOIL Hours Into A Payroll Payout.
toilClaims.createDescription: Request A TOIL Cash Claim On Behalf Of An Employee.
toilClaims.searchPlaceholder: Search By Employee Name Or Code…

infoPanel.title: How This Works
infoPanel.step1: The requested hours are held against the employee's available TOIL balance so they can't be claimed twice elsewhere.
infoPanel.step2: An approver reviews the request and approves or rejects it.
infoPanel.step3: Once approved, the payout is picked up automatically by the next payroll run.

settings.description: Configure fiscal calendar, default GL accounts, and journal policies.
settings.negativeInventoryWarning: Warning: Allow/Approval Required permit a sale to push on-hand stock below zero, and can complete with $0 COGS when no cost layers exist. This understates expenses and overstates profit — use only when you accept that financial risk.

backdatedPolicy.allow: Allow — post backdated entries without restriction
backdatedPolicy.warn: Warn — post and flag backdated entries for review

zeroCostPolicy.block: Block — reject zero-cost receipts and sales
zeroCostPolicy.warn: Warn — allow, flag, and log zero-cost receipts and sales
zeroCostPolicy.allow: Allow — permit zero-cost receipts and sales silently

negativeInventoryPolicy.strict: Strict — block any sale that would go below available stock
negativeInventoryPolicy.allow: Allow — permit sales to go negative without restriction
negativeInventoryPolicy.approvalRequired: Approval Required — requires manager PIN + pos.override-stock permission
